name: Exam rescue
description: The user has very limited time before a test and needs a compressed, high-yield plan.

name: Solve problem
description: The user wants help solving a specific question or screenshot.

name: Clarify input
description: The request is underspecified and should be clarified before execution.

name: Review plan
description: The user wants a structured study or review schedule.

name: Learning route
description: The user wants topics ordered into a learning sequence.

name: Priority judgment
description: The user wants to know what matters most before doing detailed work.

name: Scope compression
description: The user wants a large study range reduced to a smaller high-yield subset.

name: Concept explanation
description: The user wants a concept explained before practice or solution steps.

name: Feedback adjustment
description: The user gives feedback and expects the next plan to change.

name: Error review
description: The user wants wrong answers or weak areas diagnosed and reviewed.

name: Timeboxing
description: The user has a fixed time budget and needs a bounded task loop.

name: Multimodal understanding
description: The user provides an image or image plus text that must be interpreted.

name: Atomic execution
description: The user needs one small task completed without a larger plan.

name: Composite planning
description: The user needs multiple dependent tasks arranged into an executable workflow.
